title: Jappafied Storage Drawers
description: A fresh new look for Storage Drawers Mod textures
body:
# **Jappafied Storage Drawers Mod**

Jappafied Storage Drawers aims to change the textures of the mod to have a look closer to the new Minecraft style since +1.14!

![Two screenshots showing the most noticable textures changes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/58cd280ec581a3750bbc218637a824350d29a931.png)

![Two screenshots showing the most noticable textures changes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7749bcfcc9ae74dfd3de956eaa1fa09c67b09317.png)
